title: Fix race timer running too fast

requirements.text: Fix the race countdown/race timer so it runs at the correct real-time rate (1 second per second). The timer must not count down faster than wall-clock time, and the race must not end prematurely immediately after starting.

quotes: the time is too fast when i start racing it finishes

acceptanceCriteria: When a race starts, the timer decrements at exactly 1 second per second of real elapsed time.
A race with a 60-second limit does not end before approximately 60 real seconds have passed.
The race does not finish immediately or within a few seconds of starting.
The fix applies to both single-player and time challenge modes.

constraints: Do not change race logic, lap counting, or scoring — only fix the timer tick rate.
nonGoals: Adding new timer UI or timer display changes.
